creator: girgen@FreeBSD.org
text:
notus-scanner fails to build in poudriere with a fresh ports tree:

ImportError: cannot import name 'Path' from 'poetry.core.utils._compat' (/usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/poetry/core/utils/_compat.py)


------

NOTE:
Please read /usr/local/share/doc/ccache/ccache-howto-freebsd.txt for
information on using ccache with FreeBSD ports and src.
